Sentinel Creot  

Guard
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded July 24th, 2007

Paladin

Category: EverQuest
This page last modified 2008-01-02 15:00:56.

Level: 30
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Battle Staff
Sentinel Creot's Head

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Increased:
  Heretics +45
  Kerra of Barren Coast +45
Factions Decreased:
  High Guard of Erudin -300
  High Council of Erudin -45
  Merchants of Erudin -225
Quests:
  Second Test of Kejaar

Report a correction

Post Comment
Much tougher!
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2017 at 2:24 PM Rating: Decent
senadincombine
14 posts
I am currently playing on Agnarr Prog server. This guy used to be tough but not that tough! Not sure if it is on Agnarr only (tho i doubt it) but my monk whose decently equipped couldnt beat him at level 45. I have almost all best in slow pre-planar gear with my hth practically maxed and he healed way too much! I had to FD and couldnt kill him. I think they changed ALL the guards from Erudin because i used to kill them for coins and now i cant kill a single one of them. Daybreak changed them to probably prevent people farming them and this include... this guy. For those who wonder where he is, he spawn near the merchant hut near the entrance and the waterline. From there he follows the beach to the small dock across the Kerrans village and goes back to the merchant hut.

▲ Page top

QuoteReply

I am currently playing on Agnarr Prog server. This guy used to be tough but not that tough! I have almost all best in slow pre-planar gear with my hth practically maxed and he healed way too much! I had to FD and couldnt kill him. I think they changed ALL the guards from Erudin because i used to kill them for coins and now i cant kill a single one of them. Daybreak changed them to probably prevent people farming them and this include... this guy. For those who wonder where he is, he spawn near the merchant hut near the entrance and the waterline. From there he follows the beach to the small dock across the Kerrans village and goes back to the merchant hut.



What did he con to you at 45?

[Mon Apr 20 18:55:17 2015] Your faction standing with Kerra has been adjusted by 45.
[Mon Apr 20 18:55:17 2015] You receive 5 gold, 6 silver and 7 copper from the corpse.
[Mon Apr 20 18:55:17 2015] Sentinel Creot's corpse says 'Prepare to meet the vengeance of Erud!'
[Mon Apr 20 18:55:17 2015] Vaner hits Sentinel Creot for 50 points of damage.
[Mon Apr 20 18:55:17 2015] Sentinel Creot has been slain by Vaner!
[Mon Apr 20 18:55:17 2015] Your Intricate Adept's Shoulderpads flickers with a pale light.
[Mon Apr 20 18:55:20 2015] --You have looted a Battle Staff.--
[Mon Apr 20 18:55:20 2015] --You have looted a Sentinel Creot's Head.--

Creot's Lvl
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 8:08 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I a 35 druid found it hard to fight him. He killed me once, then kited him around for 15 mins befor I decided to gate the hell out. His healing ability just blew my mana, and I couldnt keep his *** rooted for long. I doted mad with droons of doom and immolated, then combust when I had mana. Saved the rest for snare and root, but the heals made up for it all(

Creot

# Oct 10 2001 at 7:35 AM Rating: Default

Anonymous
Killed him the other day easy used a skele in front of me and i hit skeleton in melee , Creot heals the skele and i nuked him in a cycle he dropped a battle staff and head staff (5/38 ish ) +10 cha Eru only \ warrior/palidan/cleric usable not really worth the effort but was curious about the quest i was 44th druid at the time :)

Self Healing
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2001 at 3:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245715331
View User Forum
34 posts
Was considering the quest and after reading the above posts I am left wondering why no one considered a DoT like Stinging Swarm or Creeping Crud to inhibit his ability to self heal. It may not stop the LoH but it should affect any other self healing that he might attempt.

Just a thought and my 2cp

Phrodoe Drogoson
Druid of 24 Seasons
Tunare
▲ Page top
Hard fight
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2001 at 1:03 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The freak is tough. I was 36 when i fought him and buffed bz a high druid (thx magan) , He killed me twice.
In the 3rd attamed i brough a 35 druid along. We were both buffed bz a 16 lev enc lady (Thx Whyst) with breeze quickness and so on and it was a dam hard fight. One of the hardest i have fought so far. Without hte breeze we would have died. The sentinel is mean. His heals are very good. and he hits aound 40 each times. So be on guard. Dont underestimate him.

Tunare with u.

llyweilun
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 06 2001 at 1:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The freak is tough. I was 36 when i fought him and buffed bz a high druid (thx magan) , He killed me twice.

Faction hit with Erud Merchants
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2000 at 5:14 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Faction hits with this guy are pretty severe. I went from indiff to apprehensive in one kill.

Thought it would be cool to get the Ghulam Bracer for my monk, so I had a friend port him in, then I dropped the Sentinel, and logged my monk in to loot. No prob, got a reasonably cool bracer.

Now, I can't use Erudin Merchants anymore. Also, tears up faction with the guards and Enchanter's Guild, too. Kinda bites into some quests I was hoping to do. :(

Be warned.
▲ Page top
Creot
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2000 at 5:34 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
There is no way he killed a level 42 with no trouble. Im a 39 ranger and can kill him toe to toe with no problem and his heals really suck, so if he killed a 42 shaman you have no idea what the hell your doing. Some ranger named Jyded
▲ Page top
Creot's level
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2000 at 5:09 AM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm a level 39 druid, he is blue to me. He has a 23minute spawn time, spawns at a hut on the beach few thousand feet from Erudin entrance. I can solo him easily, he has full heal, but only casts it once, and hace low hitpoints, he is a Paladin, weak one at that. Yes, i was kiting him, but, even i could kill him toe to toe. I assume he's around level 35 or so con, but, doesn't fight like much more than a 30. I been trying to improve my Kerra Isle faction, and been killing him a lot. He does always drop a +5charisma lore staff, as well as his head. For his wandering path he wanders down the beach, although i always pull him before he gets very far, not sure where he goes after that. I'm on Xegony server, send Fluzzlemarr a tell if ya got any questions, or email me at Smurfyhalo@hotmail.com.
▲ Page top
RE: Creot's level
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2001 at 7:45 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Creot's path will take him from the little fishing dock down the coast to the nearest little merchant hut. He may swing back the long way through the forest if he gets distracted by fire beetles, kobalds and the like, which he likes to slay "for the glory of Erudin" or something like that. Unless he's being camped, he's your typical wandering, KS'ing guard.

When he hits the fishing dock, he'll pause for about 10 seconds and say "Fear not, citizens, for Sentinal Creot is on the watch!"

For some reason, he's not watchful enough to take out the heretic necromancer standing a few feet away.

As with all of the Erudin guards, he's a paladin, and he will buff himself, lay hands, and heal as needed, plus he wears a tunic spiffier than any you'll be able to wear.
▲ Page top
RE: Creot's level
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2000 at 10:35 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I attempted to kill Creot at level 36 (druid) and couldn't. He is level 30, he uses LOH at half health (which only took 2 bubs mana to reach with 175 wis) and then continued to cast heal after every blast until I was oom. Toe to toe with a damage shield, he nearly beat me down 3 times until I enlisted a lev 31 ranger to keep him busy while I nuked him to death. The staff is NOT +5 cha, it's +10 cha erud only war/cleric/paladin. Horrid stats for battle but effective as a crude stein for selling/buying. He is tougher than he looks, but only because he constantly heals, any warrior type class should be able to beat him fairly easy as long as they interrupt his heals with a bash and contrary to popular belief, you can interrupt LOH, I've done it before with a stun spell, but only once.
▲ Page top

This fella is no longer level 30, He conned Red and killed a level 42 Troll Shaman with no trouble at all. He is most likely level 50, like the other guards in the forrest.
